title: The BeOS Bible
summary: I spent a few hours last night unbinding The BeOS Bible (1999, @ScotHacker ) using a hairdryer and putting it through a feed scanner, making light work of 994 pages! The resulting 100MB Searchable PDF is now on @InternetArchive & @OpenLibrary #preservation https://t.co/b8ypsCNHwZ pic.twitter.com/vN1cQ487OO — Matt Sephton🎴 (@gingerbeardman) November 11, 2020
content:
I spent a few hours last night unbinding The BeOS Bible (1999, @ScotHacker) using a hairdryer and putting it through a feed scanner, making light work of 994 pages!

The resulting 100MB Searchable PDF is now on @InternetArchive & @OpenLibrary #preservation https://t.co/b8ypsCNHwZ pic.twitter.com/vN1cQ487OO

— Matt Sephton🎴 (@gingerbeardman) November 11, 2020
